copy.title: Choose your lantern avatar
copy.body: Pick a look for your journey. You can change this anytime.

a11y_copy.body_sr: There are twelve avatar options in a 3-column grid. Each avatar is a button. Double-tap to select. The selected avatar will be announced.
hints: All targets are at least 44 points

error_copy.load_failed: We couldn't load avatars. Check your connection and try again.

copy.title: Set your starting pace
copy.body: Choose Floor, Target, and Stretch times. Start small and grow at your pace.

a11y_copy.body_sr: Three radio options for floor, target, and stretch. You can edit numbers directly.
hints: Numeric input is available for screen readers
Long-press an option to hear an explanation

error_copy.invalid_values: Please set target above floor and stretch above target.
error_copy.persist_failed: Couldn't save your preset. Try again.

copy.title: Protect your sleep
copy.body: Set quiet hours when Aether stays silent by default. You can still start a session manually.

a11y_copy.body_sr: Dual-handle slider for start and end time. Text inputs are available as an alternative.
hints: Start and end cannot be equal

error_copy.invalid_range: Start and end can't be the same.
error_copy.persist_failed: Couldn't save quiet hours. Try again.

copy.title: Privacy choices
copy.body: Local-first by default. No gambling mechanics. You control what is shared. Review and choose what you allow.

a11y_copy.body_sr: Modal dialog with two options, Allow and Not now. Focus is trapped until you make a choice.
hints: We announce the first heading on open

error_copy.persist_failed: Couldn't record your choice. Please try again.

copy.title: Gentle reminders (optional)
copy.body: Allow notifications to get timely nudges during your preferred hours.

a11y_copy.body_sr: We will show the system prompt next. You can allow or don't allow.
hints: You can change this anytime in Settings

error_copy.os_prompt_failed: Couldn't open the system prompt. Try again from Settings.

copy.title: See progress in action
copy.body: A tile lights up when you complete your floor. Simple, satisfying, and non-gambling.

a11y_copy.body_sr: The animation is decorative. A caption describes what's happening.
hints: Reduced motion shows a static frame

concise_copy.title: How it feels
concise_copy.body: Tiles light up when floor is done

error_copy.load_failed: Couldn't load the demo. You can continue without it.

copy.title: Try a 60-second floor
copy.body: Tap Start to feel the rhythm. You can stop anytime.

a11y_copy.body_sr: Primary button labeled Start trial. A timer screen will open.
hints: We announce when the session completes

error_copy.navigation_failed: Couldn't open the timer. Try again.
error_copy.session_failed: We couldn't start a session. Please retry.

copy.title: You're in!
copy.body: Onboarding complete. Add your first habit to begin.

a11y_copy.body_sr: You can now add your first habit or explore the app.

analytics_events.name: onboarding_step_view
analytics_events.trigger: When a specific onboarding step becomes visible

analytics_events.name: onboarding_step_complete
analytics_events.trigger: User completes required interaction for a step

analytics_events.name: onboarding_step_skip
analytics_events.trigger: User taps Skip at or after earliest skip time

analytics_events.name: avatar_selected
analytics_events.trigger: User selects an avatar in AvatarGrid

analytics_events.name: os_push_prompt_shown
analytics_events.trigger: System push permission prompt is displayed

analytics_events.name: os_push_prompt_result
analytics_events.trigger: User responds to system push prompt

analytics_events.name: demo_viewed
analytics_events.trigger: Demo tile animation completes one loop or user taps Next

analytics_events.name: trial_start
analytics_events.trigger: User taps TryNowButton to start Timer

analytics_events.name: meta_test_plan
analytics_events.trigger: Static test plan for E2E automation

happy_path: Load onboarding, view avatar, select avatar, next
skip_and_exit: Skip demo, skip first_trial, reach success
a11y: Screen reader focus starts at step title
Modal privacy dialog traps focus and has dismiss
analytics: onboarding_step_complete fires with success true on save actions
onboarding_step_skip fires when skipping within allowed windows
